name: Key Lime Pie i - Low Fat Version
recipeIngredient: 1 Whole graham cracker pie crust, 9 inch
14 oz Eagle Brand Condensed Milk, Fat-Free
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake a pie shell or use a graham cracker crust if preferred.
2. Beat yolks on medium speed until thick and lemon-colored.
3. Heat lime juice in a saucepan over medium heat until thoroughly heated.
4. Gradually stir about 1/4 of the hot lime juice into yolks, then add yolks to remaining hot lime juice in the saucepan, stirring constantly.
5. Cook for 2 minutes, stirring continually. Remove from heat and cool.
6. Add sweetened condensed milk, stirring until the mixture thickens.
7. Spoon filling into crust and refrigerate until thoroughly chilled.
8. Beat cream with an electric mixer at high speed until foamy. Add sugar, 1 tablespoon at a time, until stiff peaks form. Spoon whipped cream onto pie.
9. Refrigerate until serving time.
